name: Brew
description: Run the most common no-input Homebrew maintenance commands (update, upgrade, cleanup) from Coco AI. Ported from the Raycast Brew extension by nhojb (MIT). Requires `brew` on PATH.

commands.name: Brew Update
commands.description: Run `brew update` to fetch the newest version of Homebrew and refresh the formulae index.

commands.name: Brew Upgrade
commands.description: Run `brew upgrade` to upgrade every outdated formula and cask. Long-running; runs detached in the background.

commands.name: Brew Cleanup
commands.description: Run `brew cleanup` to remove old downloads and unused versions of installed formulae from the cache.
